song.title: Just As I Am
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Just as I am, without one plea, But that Thy blood was shed for me, And that Thou bid’st me come to Thee, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V2] 2) Just as I am, and waiting not To rid my soul of one dark blot; To Thee whose blood Can cleanse each spot, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V3] 3) Just as I am, though tossed about With many a conflict many a doubt; Fightings within, and fears without, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V4] 4) Just as I am, poor, wretched, blind; Sight, riches, healing of the mind; Yes, all I need, in Thee to find, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V5] 5) Just as I am, Thou wilt receive, Wilt welcome, pardon, cleanse, relieve; Because Thy promise I believe, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
[V6] 6) Just as I am, Thy love unknown Has broken every barrier down; Now, to be Thine, yea, Thine alone, O Lamb of God, I come, I come!
song.author: Charlotte Elliot
